_comment: CHAD Position-Aware Equity Exit Overlay — pre-registered config per ops/pending_actions/EXIT_AUDIT_equity_roundtrip_close_2026-07-13.md (Q5(b)). Committed with the SHADOW-first overlay. THRESHOLDS ARE FROZEN: changing any threshold is a deliberate logged event; a post-evaluation change counts as a new trial. The SOLE field expected to change post-freeze is `mode` (off -> shadow -> active), and each mode change is its own authorization commit per the pre-registered activation criteria in the PA doc (git history is the enforcement-authorization log). The env kill-switch CHAD_POSITION_EXIT_OVERLAY (OFF|SHADOW|ACTIVE) overrides this file's `mode` for emergency inerting.

_threshold_notes.atr_period: Wilder ATR lookback (bars) from data/bars/1d cache — same period gamma uses (chad/strategies/gamma.py:79).
_threshold_notes.atr_trail_mult: Trailing-stop distance in ATRs below the favorable extreme (peak for longs / trough for shorts). 2.5 sits between gamma's 2.4 atr_trail_mult and a looser swing stop.
_threshold_notes.hard_stop_loss_pct: Fixed backstop: fraction of the persisted entry anchor price. 0.08 = 8% adverse move from entry force-closes regardless of ATR.
_threshold_notes.min_bars_for_atr: Minimum valid daily bars required before the ATR-trailing condition is armed; below this only max-hold and hard-stop evaluate.
_threshold_notes.max_hold_days: Time-based max-hold per asset class (calendar days from guard opened_at). default applies to any unlisted asset class.
